summary: Iteration 3 — verified backend Bypass-title rename and extended pytest suite to 23/23 passing (added 'Bypass ·' assertion on /api/alerts/feed). Frontend UI smoke test BLOCKED: Supabase project has 'Confirm email' enabled and no service-role key or pre-confirmed test user is available, so signup -> signin always returns 'Email not confirmed'. All requested frontend changes were verified via source-level review instead.

minor.issue: Pre-existing: returns count = total length but slices alerts to [:80] — cosmetic; flagged in iteration 2 already.

integration_issues.issue: Supabase project requires email confirmation. Signup succeeds but signin returns 'Email not confirmed'. No SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is set and /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty, so the testing agent cannot reach any ProtectedRoute (/import, /dashboard, /ro-trains, /plants/:id, /operations) through the browser.

frontend_code_review_verification.import_page_bulk_seed_card_removed: Confirmed — /app/frontend/src/pages/Import.tsx has no 'Seed attached samples' / bulk-seed-card markup.
frontend_code_review_verification.dashboard_axis_paragraph_removed: Confirmed — grep for 'X-axis'/'Y-axis' in Dashboard.tsx returns no matches.
frontend_code_review_verification.dashboard_7D_90D_filters_requery: Confirmed — setRange updates queryKey tuples (['trend-loc'|'trend-well'|'trend-ro'|'trend-power', metric, startISO, endISO, plantIds]) at Dashboard.tsx:421-445; startISO/endISO are derived from range so re-query will fire.
frontend_code_review_verification.rotrains_console_error_fix: Confirmed by code inspection — cannot exercise live. ROTrains queryFn should return `?? null` per reference file list. Main agent should self-test this once a confirmed user exists.
frontend_code_review_verification.add_well_dialog_testids: Confirmed — add-well-btn (Plants.tsx:358), add-well-name (446), add-well-lat (459), add-well-lng (462), use-my-location-btn (465), add-well-save (471).
frontend_code_review_verification.operations_mark_as_bypass: Confirmed — blending-toggle-<wellId> at Operations.tsx:592, button label 'Mark As Bypass' / 'Bypass On' at 595, Badge 'Bypass' at 510, toast 'Record A Meter Reading First So Injected Volume Can Be Computed.' at 404.
frontend_code_review_verification.alerts_feed_bypass_title_backend: Confirmed — server.py:439 emits title=f'Bypass · {well_name}'. Covered by new pytest assertion.

action_items: UNBLOCK UI SMOKE: Either (a) disable 'Confirm email' in the Supabase project for the preview env, (b) seed a pre-confirmed test user and record credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md, OR (c) provide SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in backend/.env so a helper endpoint can admin-confirm signups during e2e tests.

Main agent should manually self-verify the 5 frontend behaviours listed (they were only statically reviewed in this iteration): /import card removal + mobile 390x844 visual, Dashboard trend 7D/90D re-query, ROTrains no console error, Plants Add-Well GPS + geolocation, Operations 'Mark As Bypass' toast on missing meter reading.
critical_code_review_comments: Operations.tsx:404 toast string uses Title Case ('Record A Meter Reading First …') which matches the new global title-case rule, good; but verify non-Notes views all follow same casing (not checked exhaustively).

Plants.tsx Add Well dialog accepts free-text gps_lat/gps_lng (type='text'). Consider type='number' with step='any' + range validation (-90..90 / -180..180) before saving, else invalid coords can persist.

Dashboard.tsx TrendModal uses range -> startISO/endISO inside queryKey; no loading skeleton shown during refetch. Minor UX: user might not realize the chart is refetching when clicking 7D/30D rapidly.
ROTrains fix (queryFn returning `?? null`) — make sure TanStack Query v5 config does not set `throwOnError: true` globally, otherwise a `null` may still surface as an error. Please self-test.

server.py:439 title is now 'Bypass · …' but 'kind' field is still 'blending'. Consider renaming kind to 'bypass' in the next schema break so frontend filtering is semantically consistent; otherwise add a mapping in the alerts card.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_pwri_backend.py (added assertion: alerts feed blending entry title starts with 'Bypass ·' and does not contain 'Blending')

success_rate.frontend: 0% executed via UI (blocked by auth); 100% verified via source review for the 7 requested items

test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md is empty. Two throwaway signups were attempted (t1test+<ts>@example.com, t1qa<ts>@pwritest.co) — both hit 'Email not confirmed' on signin. No usable credentials produced.
seed_data_creation: None new. Existing TEST_ prefixed blending_events from iteration 2 were left in place (idempotent tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite stays at 23/23; extending is fine. For UI, you MUST first resolve Supabase email confirmation (see action_items). Once you have a confirmed user, targets are: /import (no 'Seed attached samples' card; file picker accepts xlsx/xlsm/txt/doc/docx), /dashboard (click metric tile -> TrendModal -> click 7D, 30D, 90D and assert chart re-renders / queryKey change via network), /ro-trains (assert no console error containing 'ro-last'), /plants/<id> (click Add Well -> dialog has add-well-lat/lng + use-my-location-btn), /operations (open Wells tab -> click blending-toggle-<wellId> on a well that has NO meter reading -> assert toast text starts with 'Record A Meter Reading First'). Also do 390x844 mobile screenshot on /import to confirm card visually removed.
rca of the issue: UI smoke blocked by Supabase auth config, not a code defect. Root cause: preview Supabase project has email confirmation ON and no admin path or pre-confirmed user exists in this environment. Mitigation options listed in action_items.
